message.content:
Search the git log of /home/ketan/project/shatter for commits that reference any of these open issue IDs. For each issue ID, search for it in commit messages. Report which issue IDs appear in commit messages and what the commits say.

Here are the open issue IDs to check:
str-2usm str-6aq str-bmh str-iw38 str-oi1d str-wxf9 str-1fr str-1hnm str-1o4m str-2kr str-3cim str-3lob str-4jx str-5wl str-61v str-76z6 str-7in9 str-7stb str-9ab str-a7s str-au5 str-b5zn str-bat str-bx3k str-cw3 str-d3q str-e0a4 str-hoyl str-j0hu str-jhks str-jzd str-kab3 str-lebv str-m6rs str-mgi str-mka str-mxa3 str-ncs str-ol3 str-pe7 str-pu5 str-q33 str-rc6i str-87k2 str-bt9h str-hsrb str-qsr3 str-2q5h str-gb25 str-7c56 str-spsk str-su5o str-wh9 str-xmtw str-yvp4 str-zwgc str-0o8 str-139 str-1wg str-1z8 str-3z5z str-49k str-4bx str-4kop str-54t str-6al str-6vl str-94q str-9asc str-9uzy str-9w8 str-a45 str-b5i str-c3e str-e0uy str-frc str-g5b str-gll str-gx0 str-gx5 str-ihw8 str-iiz str-j7cn str-m5m str-mu3h str-n6p str-nfg2 str-nh7l str-nq20 str-pyb str-qkl str-rtyl str-tbf str-tdzh str-tycq str-u6f str-w4c str-wt7 str-wtxu str-yu0 str-yzfn str-z58 str-zty str-1k1g str-1w5x str-34ib str-548q str-7o20 str-aslo str-sxyx str-umw3 str-wiza str-qgpf str-vv76 str-xuht str-l22q str-u7mr str-djqh str-hhve str-jxs0 str-r59s str-67dt str-uzdw str-xmll str-su5o.9

Run: git log --all --oneline | grep -E '(str-2usm|str-6aq|str-bmh|str-iw38|...)' for each batch. Use multiple grep passes if needed to cover all IDs. Only report IDs that actually appear in commit messages.

content.text: I'll search the git log for all these issue IDs in batches using grep.

content.text:
Here are the open issue IDs that appear in commit messages:

| Issue ID | Commits | Summary |
|----------|---------|---------|
| **str-1hnm** | `46a0e8b` | `feat(float-probe): detect integer-treating number parameters (str-1hnm)` |
| **str-7in9** | `ec0d0c4` | `feat(docker): add production Dockerfile, publish workflow, and GitHub Action (str-7in9)` |
| **str-4jx** | `a9fb8c4`, `a9fb8c4`/`5c79822` (bd sync), `9028fd5` (bd sync) | `feat: implement sampling mode — fix qualified-name bugs, add batching, mock quality reporting (str-4jx)`; also mentioned in bd sync commits breaking it down into sub-issues |
| **str-d3q** | `0dc5f43` | Referenced in bd sync commit filing holdout evaluation issues |
| **str-yu0** | `0dc5f43`, `c1edbfd` | Referenced in bd sync commits (filed as holdout evaluation issue, design updated) |
| **str-49k** | `0dc5f43`, `c1edbfd` | Referenced in bd sync commits (filed as holdout evaluation issue, design updated) |
| **str-su5o** | `b9b389e`, `46dff32`, `fd134b7`, `b48555f`, `8086747`, `4e51d0d`, `e67fe86`, `7115baa`, `fcdf2d9`, `fef22c9`, `674cd34`, `16f410b` | Extensive work across multiple sub-issues (str-su5o.1 through str-su5o.8, str-su5o-10) covering nondeterminism detection: data model, within-run re-execution sampling, value-pattern heuristics, config, BehaviorMap/FunctionSpec integration |
| **str-iiz** | `9028fd5` | Referenced in bd sync commit breaking it down into sub-issues |
| **str-wt7** | `9028fd5` | Referenced in bd sync commit breaking it down into sub-issues |
| **str-wh9** | `ce159b9` | `Add full dry-run mode for scan command (str-wh9)` |
| **str-c3e** | `a9fb8c4`, `5c79822` | Referenced in bd sync commits as remaining work created from str-4jx |

**11 of the open issue IDs** appear in commit messages: `str-1hnm`, `str-7in9`, `str-4jx`, `str-d3q`, `str-yu0`, `str-49k`, `str-su5o` (heavily), `str-iiz`, `str-wt7`, `str-wh9`, and `str-c3e`. The remaining issue IDs had no matches in the git log.
